title: cyperus umbilensis
intro: Cyperus umbilensis, also known as fingerroot, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus umbilensis include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of fingerroot typically involve drying and grinding the rhizomes, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
